category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an open source hot backup tool for InnoDB and XtraDB databases; official GitHub README describes Percona XtraBackup as a MySQL hot backup utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is percona-xtrabackup; official GitHub README heading uses Percona XtraBackup.
docs_sources: Official Percona documentation domain provides Percona XtraBackup documentation pages for supported release lines.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Percona GitHub repository is percona/percona-xtrabackup and its README links the Percona product homepage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names hot backup, InnoDB, and XtraDB; source_facts.executables includes xtrabackup CLI tools; official GitHub topics include mysql and backup.
